title: Agent-Roles role.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of roles/<category>/<slug>/role.md. The build tool (tools/build.py) enforces an equivalent set of rules in Python; this file exists for documentation and editor tooling. Note: `id` must equal the role's directory name and `category` its parent directory name — constraints a JSON Schema cannot express.

id.description: Stable identifier; must equal the role directory name.

name.description: Human-readable display name, e.g. "T.A.G. — Text Adventure Generator".

category.description: Must equal the parent directory name and be listed in catalog.yaml categories.

description.description: One-paragraph summary; emitted as a folded block in index.yaml.

targets.description: Harness formats this role is built/maintained for. Phase 1 roles are all system-prompt; later phases add more.

interaction.description: conversational = multi-turn dialogue; single-shot = one input, one deliverable; pipeline = stage in an automated multi-agent pipeline.

safety_notes.description: Required in practice for health-category roles and roles with governance.minors_involved (scripts/test-roles.sh greps prompts for safety language; this field documents the policy). Emitted as a literal block.

companions.description: Role ids that pair well with this one. Emitted inline ([a, b]).

chain_after.description: Role ids that should run before this one. Emitted inline — resolve.sh only parses the bracket form.

chain_before.description: Role ids that should run after this one. Emitted inline.

meta_target.description: For meta-roles that operate on other roles (e.g. "all").
